summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new GitHub Pages-ready static site at /app/cc-property-care-static. Verified simple structure (index.html, css/styles.css, js/main.js, assets/), confirmed no React/build dependencies, validated all content and functionality, tested responsive layout. Confirmed saved React version exists at /app/saved_versions/react-static-current.
passed_tests: ✅ Saved React version exists at /app/saved_versions/react-static-current with package.json confirming React 19
✅ New static structure verified: index.html, css/styles.css, js/main.js, assets/ with 11 local images
✅ Static site serves without build step (python3 -m http.server)
✅ SEO elements complete: title, meta description, keywords, og tags
✅ No React root div or build scripts in index.html
✅ No Emergent/PostHog/React/MongoDB/FastAPI/backend/api references found (rg search)
✅ No external image CDN references (cloudinary/imgur/unsplash/pexels)
✅ All 13 images load from local assets/ paths
✅ Logo visible in header (assets/logo.png)
✅ Services and About navigation links work with smooth scroll
✅ 4 book buttons found, all linking to Google Form (https://forms.gle/11TXTAgdrrRsnP749)
✅ All 5 service accordions present and closed by default (Garbage cans, Fences, Driveways, Wooden decks, Custom inquiries)
✅ Accordion interaction works: open/close on click, content visible when expanded
✅ Contact info displayed correctly: phone (631) 401-7026, email propertycare.cnc@gmail.com
✅ Footer contact order correct: email then phone
✅ All page sections present: hero, keywords, proof, services, about, final-cta, footer
✅ Before/after proof section with 2 before and 2 after labels
✅ Trust indicators present: Free estimates, Local Long Island, Fast scheduling
✅ Keywords section with 12 SEO keyword badges
✅ Final CTA section with Google Form link
✅ No console errors detected
✅ Mobile responsive layout: CTA bar visible on mobile, header book button hidden
✅ README.md includes GitHub Pages deployment instructions (Option A: root, Option B: /docs)
✅ Only allowed external integrations: Google Fonts and Google Form
